Friend,

I’m so proud of what Hoosiers have accomplished together.

**In my time as your governor, we have seen Hoosier employment increase. We’ve funded education resources for our students at record levels, as we’re hearing positive reports across the state of school districts passing along those those investments through well-deserved teacher raises. **

**We’ve built up Hoosier infrastructure bigger and better than ever before, and we’ve taken the fight to the drug epidemic and other public health challenges like infant mortality.**

**We’ve made real progress in all these areas – and it’s led to prosperity for Hoosiers across our state.**
_In reality, this progress has only been possible because of Hoosiers like YOU. I’m deeply committed to another four years of this progress, and if Hoosiers re-elect me as your governor, I promise we will NOT slow down._

[**Are you in to help us continue this momentum? Then consider contributing to the Holcomb Crew Hoosier Prosperity Fund to help us reach out to Hoosier voters across our state -- in person, in the media, and online -- so that we can tell the story of our continuing prosperity. **](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=475d50dc535f4d008dd984918bf3f839&_e=qg784dz4xt42y5GUcI6xvdv6jrGuF9nVGeZw2YCzdn5EupEO1-DM_oBzfJjGuk975jO8X2AJXR9pxzpt9qBXsDbQmjHcXukyCLRYMDQv75hAEn7byxmxqTB5icrkHtArjPYiUh0rfaWdSp7GiU47DdqzTixjjZgxXSVX2Aq7s67p1KfmN5C7oujbZCyCyVffDXztch--rW5qXqHlKKoC57YrevMg8TqQ75u0EfOqHupAhX4kKzXvXb8l-ECRkQ1ODzA86DRcuuEuJG3FnG9BJZHqZ-86MO6iPmuce92yENmF-BHbzi8L5OyBvuAT8nx1V38Mpp37YnwXakg2EdOU9ni7GqqOPAEeggUUzlJNN0Sfzf96dUeRIf3p0VGAWG6fSpWd5hA-GSV31eLyRWiyuDZ8y-17x4a4mxfasO2PzP0%3D)[**Chip in any amount to help Indiana growing!**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=475d50dc535f4d008dd984918bf3f839&_e=qg784dz4xt42y5GUcI6xvdv6jrGuF9nVGeZw2YCzdn5EupEO1-DM_oBzfJjGuk975jO8X2AJXR9pxzpt9qBXsDbQmjHcXukyCLRYMDQv75hAEn7byxmxqTB5icrkHtArjPYiUh0rfaWdSp7GiU47DdqzTixjjZgxXSVX2Aq7s67p1KfmN5C7oujbZCyCyVffDXztch--rW5qXqHlKKoC5_iGS2lQLbMZz2Fkk2QnAzaxVSZvGmXlLMbtXOEviKVE90PYTo6pRx88wswEH0puIGxTfm-BWkGbd31Wo00TlSoPMllxR1RA63sE8JpkGJXBhX5CFxAbvM4AAr8xU55RH__UoLdRlaReFkc_Wn1y7I27vNEkBLWCYIHE1Q_jhvRZXQDOYrNN29OA3YrXbH-Ru_o3wePJxONHlsbP9Sbsf1w%3D)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I believe our personal data should be considered our private property. If you agree please add your name and join this fight.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Thanks for lending your voice on this important issue.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1733%2E377263%2E4MGPsn) **Tech companies are getting rich off our data.** [Add your name here and help take back control of your data.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-data-petition-20191017?source=email-20191017pm-all&t=6&akid=1733%2E377263%2E4MGPsn) Yang Gang --

When you surf the web, do you ever click “I agree” on a user agreement without reading the whole thing? Tech companies pretend it’s a choice, but in reality, 99% of us just click that button as quickly as we can. And each time we do, we’re forfeiting all of our personal data while the tech companies get rich at our expense.

If someone else is using your data, you should know about it. If someone else is profiting off of your data, you should get a cut.

A recent study shows that our data is now more valuable than oil! Imagine handing over cash every time they force you to check that box -- because that’s what’s really happening.

In short, I want your data to be yours. That’s why I’ve proposed to make tech companies share the economic value of any data they collect from you.

This could be a win-win for many tech companies. Individuals would have the option to de-anonymize their data and sell it to tech companies who are happy to pay for it. Or, they could simply refuse to take part and keep your data private.

[Sign this petition if you believe that tech companies shouldn’t be able to get rich off our data without giving us our fair share. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-data-petition-20191017?source=email-20191017pm-all&t=8&akid=1733%2E377263%2E4MGPsn) | [Sign the Petition](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-data-petition-20191017?source=email-20191017pm-all&t=7&akid=1733%2E377263%2E4MGPsn)
---
If somebody is profiting from our data, and we decide willingly to partner with a company that’s making use of this information -- then that’s only fair as long as we get a slice. Right now, we’re unaware of the value that’s changing hands and we’re definitely not getting a data check in the mail.

Thanks for lending your voice on this important issue.

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13832?t=2&akid=1733%2E377263%2E4MGPsn)

clean_body: Thanks for lending your voice on this important issue. | Tech companies are getting rich off our data. Yang Gang -- When you surf the web, do you ever click “I agree” on a user agreement without reading the whole thing? Tech companies pretend it’s a choice, but in reality, 99% of us just click that button as quickly as we can. And each time we do, we’re forfeiting all of our personal data while the tech companies get rich at our expense. If someone else is using your data, you should know about it. If someone else is profiting off of your data, you should get a cut. A recent study shows that our data is now more valuable than oil! Imagine handing over cash every time they force you to check that box -- because that’s what’s really happening. In short, I want your data to be yours. That’s why I’ve proposed to make tech companies share the economic value of any data they collect from you. This could be a win-win for many tech companies. Individuals would have the option to de-anonymize their data and sell it to tech companies who are happy to pay for it. Or, they could simply refuse to take part and keep your data private. | If somebody is profiting from our data, and we decide willingly to partner with a company that’s making use of this information -- then that’s only fair as long as we get a slice. Right now, we’re unaware of the value that’s changing hands and we’re definitely not getting a data check in the mail. Thanks for lending your voice on this important issue. -Andrew Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement. |

name: Cory Booker
subject: Women are people. And all people deserve to control their own bodies.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, A woman's right to choose is under attack in this country. I want to be clear: It's on men to speak out, too. It's on men to take action as well. Not because women are our mothers, wives, daughters. Because women are people. And all people deserve to control their own bodies. **At a time when the attacks on women's rights are particularly acute, we must put our money where our mouths are to support women.[Add your name and say you'll stand with me in fighting back against efforts to dramatically roll back abortion access.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-protect-abortion-access?source=em_pet_20191017_CB_20191017-pet-CB-reprorights-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I promise to do everything in my power to make sure that a woman's body is under the purview of that woman -- not a bunch of politicians in Washington or a state capitol. I've fought my whole career to protect choice, and I'm not stopping now. We must come together to stop the dangerous, far-right movement to erode women's rights and access to health care. **And that includes creating a White House Office of Reproductive Freedom.** **[Add your name right now to say you'll stand with me in fighting to protect women's reproductive rights across the country.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-protect-abortion-access?source=em_pet_20191017_CB_20191017-pet-CB-reprorights-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In solidarity,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/cory-2020-protect-abortion-access?source=em_pet_20191017_CB_20191017-pet-CB-reprorights-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a2d/5fca0d19/76950cbd/291ff39d/3073833326/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a2d/5fca0d19/76950cbd/291ff39c/3073833326/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a2d/5fca0d19/76950cbd/291ff39b/3073833326/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a2d/5fca0d19/76950cbd/291ff39a/3073833326/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a2d/5fca0d19/76950cbd/291ff399/3073833326/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: Alex M. Triantafilou & Jeff Monroe
subject: Why We’re With Steve Chabot
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdiyuijt-kujkulhluu-t/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdiyuijt-kujkulhluu-r/) October 17, 2019Dear Fellow Republicans & Ohio Voters:We write to you today to offer our endorsement for Congressman Steve Chabot and to respectfully ask you to join us in supporting his reelection in 2020.As many of you already know, Congressman Chabot has been a steadfast friend and reliable conservative champion for Hamilton and Warren Counties as well as for the Republican Party for the duration of his nearly 25 years of service in Washington.From his first election in 1994 to today, Congressman Chabot has been a rock-ribbed fighter for conservative principles and common sense results for hardworking Ohio families.Congressman Chabot has been a tireless champion for our constitutional rights, the lives of the unborn and a secure border. Chabot has been a reliable advocate for American leadership in the world, a strong military and a system that provides our veterans with the care they deserve.Chabot has been an integral supporter of the most consequential tax cuts for middle-class Ohio families passed in Washington in the last 20 years - including President Trump's tax cut in 2017.As the Republican leader of the U.S. House Committee on Small Business, Chabot continues to fight for common sense conservative policies to support Ohio small businesses, create jobs, lift wages and slash regulatory red tape.Chabot has worked diligently and compassionately to combat the scourge of the opioid epidemic in our communities. In just the past several weeks, Chabot has visited several opioid treatment clinics to monitor the impact of action he's taken in Congress and to hear what more can be done.At a time when the Democratic Party has been taken over by a radical resistance determined to reverse the outcome of the 2016 election, impeach President Trump and advance an extreme agenda, we need reliable conservative leaders in Congress like Steve Chabot more than ever.Chabot's depth of experience as a prosecutor and public servant has made him one of the president's most effective defenders in Washington -- and a key ally in advancing the president's agenda.With so much at stake, we need reliable conservatives who know what it means to deliver results for Ohio families in Washington.Congressman Chabot has been a friend and champion for our communities for 25 years. We respectfully ask you to join us in supporting his reelection. Sincerely,** ** Alex M. Triantafilou _Chairman, Hamilton County Republican Party_ Jeff Monroe _Chairman, Warren County Republican Party_ | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdiyuijt-kujkulhluu-y/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdiyuijt-kujkulhluu-j/)
---|---
6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: The next presidential debate will happen right here in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
We need to keep voting rights front and center as we prepare to welcome candidates on November 20. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa563/34a064cc/18d71799/7030641/4070040002/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Did you watch Tuesday night's presidential debate? There wasn't a single question asking candidates about what they would do, if elected president, to dismantle voter suppression and to ensure free and fair elections for all. Next month's Democratic presidential debate will be held right here in Georgia, friend. Our state is the premier battleground state up and down the ballot, but it's also ground zero for voter suppression. We need to keep the conversation on voting rights front and center as we prepare to welcome candidates on November 20. Next year, Georgia's 16 electoral votes are in play, and Georgia is the only state in the country set to have two U.S. Senate races on the ballot, making it clear that any viable strategy to Democratic control of the White House and the Senate must include Georgia. \- Team Fair Fight

name: Joe Sestak
subject: 68 miles into my walk across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
It was an early morning yesterday. I was up before the dawn. A tree had fallen along the way. But still I had to walk on.
Through day and night, whether clear skies or torrential downpour, I will walk from small towns to small farms, from small businesses to Veteran-owned BBQ joints and Community Music centers. I am walking in your shoes, understanding the problems faced by ordinary Americans. I will continue to present progressive, pragmatic solutions to those same problems.
As for the 5 AM fallen tree, it was no match for the staff and me. We split that log in two, and continued without further ado.
I even managed to grab a cup of Joe, despite a power cut in Mont Vernon.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10967797/111100794/-1084476337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTA1MTJkZS04OWYxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8gL5m1RnK6ETxtDwGR9-5BIB-0Ldyxkb_RU81eJYKw=&emci=e461d30a-3df1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=7a0512de-89f1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
After two hours of walking, a stake went into the ground and the team and I departed for coffee with Atkinson, Plaistow and Hampstead Democrats at the Ober Easy Diner. The diner was founded by a former engineer, Susan, and her husband - who still works as an engineer, but also cooks on weekends!
After returning to walk for another 6 miles - and stopping to talk to Adam Sexton of local ABC affiliate WMUR (video [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10967798/111100795/1218997733?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTA1MTJkZS04OWYxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8gL5m1RnK6ETxtDwGR9-5BIB-0Ldyxkb_RU81eJYKw=&emci=e461d30a-3df1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=7a0512de-89f1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)) - I stopped for a bite to eat at Smokehaus BBQ. This fantastic small business was built by a former Navy vet, Dave, and has already won a ton of awards in New Hampshire in the year and a half since it opened. I recommend the chopped pork!
My walk finished in Manchester, where I held an event about autism at the Community Music School. As a member of Congress, I fought hard to secure the first new federal funding for autism treatment and services in over twelve years. Later that evening, I attended a local Democratic meeting in Hudson, and talked about defense reform, climate change and helathcare - and why I can not only talk the talk, but when elected I will walk the walk.
I’m now kicking off day 6, where I’ll be traveling from Peterborough to Mont Vernon. For my schedule for the day,** please check out our events page ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10967799/111100796/1785005326?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTA1MTJkZS04OWYxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8gL5m1RnK6ETxtDwGR9-5BIB-0Ldyxkb_RU81eJYKw=&emci=e461d30a-3df1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=7a0512de-89f1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&ref=page_internal "This external link will open in a new window")).**

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/e461d30a-3df1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/7a0512de-89f1-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTA1MTJkZS04OWYxLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z8gL5m1RnK6ETxtDwGR9-5BIB-0Ldyxkb_RU81eJYKw=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

I even managed to grab a cup of Joe, despite a power cut in Mont Vernon. After two hours of walking, a stake went into the ground and the team and I departed for coffee with Atkinson, Plaistow and Hampstead Democrats at the Ober Easy Diner. The diner was founded by a former engineer, Susan, and her husband - who still works as an engineer, but also cooks on weekends! After returning to walk for another 6 miles - and stopping to talk to Adam Sexton of local ABC affiliate WMUR (video ) - I stopped for a bite to eat at Smokehaus BBQ. This fantastic small business was built by a former Navy vet, Dave, and has already won a ton of awards in New Hampshire in the year and a half since it opened. I recommend the chopped pork! My walk finished in Manchester, where I held an event about autism at the Community Music School. As a member of Congress, I fought hard to secure the first new federal funding for autism treatment and services in over twelve years. Later that evening, I attended a local Democratic meeting in Hudson, and talked about defense reform, climate change and helathcare - and why I can not only talk the talk, but when elected I will walk the walk. I’m now kicking off day 6, where I’ll be traveling from Peterborough to Mont Vernon. For my schedule for the day, please check out our events page ( "This external link will open in a new window"). Paid for by Joe Sestak for President. Joe Sestak P.O Box 17246 Alexandria, VA 22302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

subject: Let's get back to work

| |
# **Unfair, Unprecedented, & Illegitimate Attacks**
Peter, I've said it before, but I will say it again -- [**Speaker Pelosi is playing politics with this impeachment witch hunt. **](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-j/) If Democrats want to impeach our President, they should go on record and vote on it. Otherwise, it is just political theater at a time when we need to be working on America's most pressing issues.
# [**It's Time for Washington to Get Back to Work.**](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-t/)
We have millions of American unable to afford quality healthcare. We are facing relentless waves of illegal immigrants crossing our border. America is at a crossroads, and we need Washington to stand with President Trump's agenda. [**Are you still supporting President Trump and his Keep America Great Agenda? **](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-i/) [ YES ](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-d/) I was elected by Hoosiers to help President Trump drain the swamp and ensure that Americans of all backgrounds are getting the best opportunities available to them. We have seen record economic growth under President Trump and American's are thriving. We cannot afford to fall victim to the socialist agenda in 2020. [**We must stand together as Hoosiers and defend our values. **](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-h/) Thank you for your continued support, Senator Mike Braun [](https://mikebraun.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdilkylt-ukvtrkydy-k/) |

subject: Take down this top Democrat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fricke for Congress
body:
I need your help to take down one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeach effort against President Trump. | [ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r)
---
Friend,

Third quarter fundraising reports are out, **and I'm officially the leading candidate** running in California's 33rd District against radical left-wing, Democrat Congressman Ted Lieu, one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeachment effort against President Trump.

[**I need your help to take down Ted Lieu**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r), and here's why:

**Ted Lieu** spent ALL his time in Congress pushing and pushing Nancy Pelosi to impeach President Trump until she finally caved to his demands - and he hasn't stopped there.

In fact, his **obsession** with the President has led him to completely ignore his suffering district.

Democrats are rapidly destroying California...
* We have the highest taxes and cost of living in the nation, and they want to raise them even higher
* After raising our gas taxes, Democrats are now **breaking their promise** to voters and diverting that money to other pet projects
* Poverty, homelessness, crime and drugs are creeping into our once-safe neighborhoods and threatening the safety of our children
* Illegal immigrants and prisoners are being prioritized over law-abiding and hard-working families

_Yet, Ted Lieu and his fellow Democrats would rather attack the President rather than fix the problems their own failed policies are creating!_

[**I need your help to take down Ted Lieu and restore representative leadership to California. Will you support my campaign with a donation of $10, $100 or any amount today?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r)
I support President Trump's efforts to secure our borders. I stand firm in my belief that we must reduce wasteful government spending of our hard-earned tax dollars. And I believe government must be accountable to the People.

Ted Lieu and the Democrats are AGAINST all of these things. It's destroying California, and unless we eliminate the Democrats' control of the House, it could destroy our nation too.

[**I need your help to take down one of the top Democrats behind the illegitimate impeach effort against President Trump. Will you chip in $10, $100 or even more to help me defeat radical Ted Lieu?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r)

Thanks,

Brandon Fricke
Candidate for Congress

[ **Defeat Pelosi & Ted Lieu ››**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53161378:WqNTi4wIN:m:1:2185358397:D219D0CF9D45A9F1C4E4FB18B4B544C3:r)

| Paid for by Fricke for Congress

**In only two and a half years, he 's achieved more than any other President:**
* **President Trump has appointed two conservative judges to the U.S. Supreme Court.**

Unfortunately, the Left is so blinded by their hatred for President Trump, that they use their only airtime to ATTACK his Administration instead of telling the TRUTH!

name: Berrett Gall
subject: Fwd: Did you see this op-ed in the Star Tribune??
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, I wanted to make sure you saw the Governor's response to Senate GOP Majority Leader Gazelka's unbelievably hurtful op-ed in the Star Tribune this week. This is what we're up against next year. Minnesota Republicans up and down the ticket are rallying around President Trump and they're prepared to spread his divisive message across our state at all costs. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
I wanted to make sure you saw the Governor's response to Senate GOP Majority Leader Gazelka's unbelievably hurtful op-ed in the Star Tribune this week.
This is what we're up against next year. Minnesota Republicans up and down the ticket are rallying around President Trump and they're prepared to spread his divisive message across our state at all costs.
It's extremely dangerous. We _need_ to be prepared to counter their negative attacks the way only we can -- with our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity.
**I just ran the numbers. We 're $1,683 short of our goal and our deadline is at midnight. [Will you chip in $5 or more to help us finish strong?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=button&amount=25)**
Thank you for supporting our work to elect allies next year who will help us overcome the politics of fear and division and fight for a brighter vision for the future of our state.
Berrett Gall
Finance Director
Tim Walz for Governor
\------- Forwarded message -------
From: Tim Walz
My friend,
Yesterday, Senate GOP Majority Leader Paul Gazelka published an op-ed in the Star Tribune praising President Trump after his visit to Minnesota last week.
His piece desperately tries to rewrite the story of President Trump's failed trade war and the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers have faced because of it, his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations, and his relentless efforts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on.
On top of it all, Majority Leader Gazelka goes to great lengths to downplay President Trump's dangerous rhetoric and erratic decision making as nothing more than "humor" and "bravado."
My friend, I'm not laughing right now. Are you?
**It 's time for Minnesota leaders to acknowledge what we all know to be true: President Trump is trying to spread hate and division because he thinks it will help him win the election next year. **Instead of joining us to condemn it last week when President Trump was in town unleashing his attacks directly on Minnesotans, Majority Leader Gazelka chose to embrace it. And that is deeply disappointing.
This is a perfect example of why it's so important for us to take back the Minnesota Senate next year and elect allies who are prepared to lead with courage and join us in the fight for a brighter vision for our state.
**To stay on track to hit our budget target this month so we can get it done, we need to raise $3,000 by Friday.[Will you make a contribution of $5 or more to help us get there in time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Senate Majority Leader Gazelka made sure to note in his op-ed that President Trump "almost won" Minnesota in 2016. And while that's true, let's remember what _actually_ won (and with historic margins) just two years later: Our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity.
**With your help, I know we will reject the politics of fear and division once again in 2020.[Please, make a contribution that works for you today so we can see it through.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
****[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)****
****[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)****
****[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)****
****[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)****
****[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=_other-p)****
Thank you for everything.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

| ********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Jpwp_BoK7S_f3jJs79hQwkq7ZNMe_34vK3iIGkVfmu8=/TtK3d7dSIGYrInPJ_JuVZZ7KpfSdLRE1O2FPt0SeI8M=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)********

Thank you for supporting our work to elect allies next year who will help us overcome the politics of fear and division and fight for a brighter vision for the future of our state. Berrett Gall Finance Director Tim Walz for Governor \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Tim Walz My friend, Yesterday, Senate GOP Majority Leader Paul Gazelka published an op-ed in the Star Tribune praising President Trump after his visit to Minnesota last week. His piece desperately tries to rewrite the story of President Trump's failed trade war and the devastating consequences Minnesota farmers have faced because of it, his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations, and his relentless efforts to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on. On top of it all, Majority Leader Gazelka goes to great lengths to downplay President Trump's dangerous rhetoric and erratic decision making as nothing more than "humor" and "bravado." My friend, I'm not laughing right now. Are you? It 's time for Minnesota leaders to acknowledge what we all know to be true: President Trump is trying to spread hate and division because he thinks it will help him win the election next year. Instead of joining us to condemn it last week when President Trump was in town unleashing his attacks directly on Minnesotans, Majority Leader Gazelka chose to embrace it. And that is deeply disappointing. This is a perfect example of why it's so important for us to take back the Minnesota Senate next year and elect allies who are prepared to lead with courage and join us in the fight for a brighter vision for our state. To stay on track to hit our budget target this month so we can get it done, we need to raise $3,000 by Friday. Senate Majority Leader Gazelka made sure to note in his op-ed that President Trump "almost won" Minnesota in 2016. And while that's true, let's remember what actually won (and with historic margins) just two years later: Our One Minnesota message that recognizes our strength in unity. With your help, I know we will reject the politics of fear and division once again in 2020. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** Thank you for everything. I'm grateful, Tim Walz | ******** | | Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor

name: SURVEY ALERT via Lipinski HQ
subject: fwd: share your experience:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
http://lipinskiforcongress.com/ [http://lipinskiforcongress.com/]
We wanted to bump Dan’s email from yesterday. Dan is in Congress fighting for access to affordable healthcare and to lower prescription drug costs, but he needs to hear from you. Take the survey right now to share your thoughts → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

Begin forwarded message:

I’ve met with countless people in the 3rd district who have been devastated by high prescription drug costs.
From 2012 to 2016, insulin nearly doubled in price. This is just one example of Big Pharma run wild, and it has to stop. That is why I’m supporting the Lower Drug Costs Now Act.

I am fighting for access to affordable healthcare, and that is why I need to hear from you. Share your experience by taking our survey on prescription drugs costs here → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

Share your story [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

The Lower Drug Costs Now Act will stop big pharmaceutical companies from ripping off hard-working Americans and help ensure affordable access to life-saving medications. Insulin is only one example — some drugs cost three, four, or even ten times what they would in other countries.

As a Type 1 diabetic myself, I know how important it is that drugs like insulin are affordable for everyone who needs them.
Have you had an experience where your prescription drugs have cost too much? Let me know by taking the survey:

https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/FFfjKuC9_Umc4c90wxaC3Q2]

Thank you for sharing your story,

Dan
Dan, an engineer and former teacher, has brought hundreds of millions of dollars in critical infrastructure projects to Illinois, fought for better schools, protections for our seniors, reforms to fix our broken Congress, and sought to make healthcare more affordable for all. We are grateful for your support. Please take a moment to like Dan on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/danlipinskiforcongress/] or follow Dan on Twitter [https://twitter.com/DanLipinski] . If you’d like to contribute to help Dan keep fighting in Congress, you can click here to support Dan’s reelection now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dl-general?refcode=footer&amount=20&recurring=auto]

body:

I'm hosting a lunch at a **VERY NICE HOTEL** in Chicago soon with only my top supporters.
---

There's only one important name missing from that guest list - YOURS.

Let's change that.

I've saved two seats at lunch for YOU and a guest. Will you accept my invitation?

name: Cory Booker
subject: Let me be clear. This election is about so much more than just what was talked about on stage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I've been thinking a lot about this week's debate, team. And I can't help but feel that for voters tuning in for the first time to see what we as Democrats have to offer, a lot of our party's core priorities were left out of the conversation. **[The fifth debate will be here before we know it. But before I start to prepare, I want to hear from you. What issues do you wish were discussed at this week's debate?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191018_CB_20191018-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I've been on the campaign trail for over eight months, talking to folks across the country about the issues that matter most to them -- so many of which got far too little attention during the debate. **Let me be clear. This election is about far more than just what was talked about on stage.** Too much time was devoted to Republican talking points, including Donald Trump's false attacks on one of our own, and trying to draw lines between us when what we should have been doing was coming together in common cause against our country's divisive leader. **[I want to know what you thought. Will you take our survey to let our campaign know which issues you felt were left out?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191018_CB_20191018-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** As always, thank you. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/post-debate-four-survey?source=em_su_20191018_CB_20191018-su-CB-debatesurvey-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's Syria blunder is turning into a disaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Trump's decision to withdraw U.S. forces from Syria and abandon our Kurdish allies is already proving to be an international disaster: Turkey has launched its expected offensive against the Kurds despite sanctions and warnings from Washington, and Russia has emerged as the new power-broker in the Middle East. That's right \-- Trump ceded even more global power over to Putin. Now, national security experts are warning that the power vacuum created could lead to the resurgence of ISIS, who the Kurds helped us defeat. This abandonment of a critical ally in the fight against terrorism sends a chilling message to the rest of the world that the U.S. will only align with you when it serves our interests and abandon you when we grow tired. This is just another instance of how Trump's unpredictable and reckless approach to foreign policy and military matters harms this nation and its ability to conduct business in the future. We're asking voters what they think: **Do you approve of Trump 's abandoning of our allies?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8e/6e9863e8/15bdba92/1db0f4d4/3146152466/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ovbN6HWT") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8e/6e9863e8/15bdba92/1db0f4d4/3146152466/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ovbN6HWT") Thank you for your response. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd8e/6e9863e8/15bdba92/1db0f4da/3146152466/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191018a.ND-b&refcode2=nZrRz8WjynfY3XTc6rkF")

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Jeanne Shaheen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
You know as well as I do that New Hampshire elections always come down to the wire.
That's going to be true as ever for my friend, Senator Jeanne Shaheen -- Trump and his allies have already made her a top target.
If Jeanne loses, any chance we have at winning back the Senate majority goes out the window. She needs your help:
[**Will you please rush $3 or whatever works for you to protect New Hampshire 's other Democratic Senate seat and secure the future of the Supreme Court?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3f3/2a380d31/3d62cf66/f0eecf/2610717730/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEwMThfTVdINENKU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191018_MWH4CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Your support is so important, everyone. Without it, we won't be able to make inroads in combating the climate crisis, _Roe v. Wade_ will be in serious jeopardy, and Donald Trump will effortlessly put more conservative justices on the Supreme Court.
[**$3 or more from you could make a huge difference, so will you please contribute whatever you 're able to right now?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc3f3/2a380d31/3d62cf66/f0eecf/2610717730/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Y2pzIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTEwMThfTVdINENKU182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4cjs?refcode=e20191018_MWH4CJS_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you for helping protect this vulnerable seat.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

Have you seen this? Moody's Analytics predicts Trump winning in Minnesota. The path to victory for Democrats runs through Minnesota, and Tina is our best defense against letting Moody's forecast becom

name: Team Beto
subject: Courage
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

We need your help: Beto is choosing courage over political safety in this
race. He knows that’s speaking the truth and taking a stand is the only
way we can fix the division and problems in our country.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]But he can’t do this by himself: We need your help to raise $2 million
and get our campaign the resources it needs so Beto can keep acting on
courage. Will you chip in $3 and help out?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]Contribute $3

We all
want to beat Trump next year.

But we need to remember that defeating Trump isn’t going to instantly cure
the division, racism, and bigotry that his administration has sewn. We
need to elect someone who doesn’t compromise their values and knows how to
build a movement from the bottom-up.

Doing that, takes courage — something Beto knows a lot about.

When many of our leaders in D.C. were debating about the political
consequences of impeaching Trump...

Beto had the courage to support impeachment since 2017.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]Choose Courage: Donate $3

When gun violence struck our country (again) and our leaders agreed
(again) that something needed to be done...

Beto had the courage to call for a mandatory assaults weapon buyback — a
critical step in gun reform.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]Choose Courage: Donate $3

When critics thought there was no point for Beto to run against Ted Cruz
in Texas — a state that hasn’t had a state-wide Democratic leader in 25
years and had the worst voter participation rate in the country...

Beto’s courage to run helped increase young voter turnout by 500%, made
Texas a battleground state for 2020, and inspired more Democrats to run in
historically red states.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]Choose Courage: Donate $3

This is a defining moment for our country. History will remember how we
chose to fight back and we hope we can put your name in the
books.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39120?refcode=ema20191018-62106&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&akid=62106%2E444211%2EnSR8Z8 ]Please help us to keep choosing courage over fear and donate
$3 to help us reach our critical fundraising goal.

- Team Beto

We need to elect someone who doesn’t compromise their values and knows how to build a movement from the bottom-up. Doing that, takes courage — something Beto knows a lot about. When many of our leaders in D.C. were debating about the political consequences of impeaching Trump... Beto had the courage to support impeachment since 2017. [ ]Choose Courage: Donate $3 When gun violence struck our country (again) and our leaders agreed (again) that something needed to be done... Beto had the courage to call for a mandatory assaults weapon buyback — a critical step in gun reform. [ ]Choose Courage: Donate $3 When critics thought there was no point for Beto to run against Ted Cruz in Texas — a state that hasn’t had a state-wide Democratic leader in 25 years and had the worst voter participation rate in the country... Beto’s courage to run helped increase young voter turnout by 500%, made Texas a battleground state for 2020, and inspired more Democrats to run in historically red states. [ ]Choose Courage: Donate $3 This is a defining moment for our country. History will remember how we chose to fight back and we hope we can put your name in the books. [ ]Please help us to keep choosing courage over fear and donate $3 to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. - Team Beto Contribute to Beto's campaign:

John is fighting for the same things the other Democratic candidates are -- like an America where every single person has access to quality, affordable health care. He's fighting for a strong economy where those at the top pay their fair share of taxes and everyone has an equal chance to get ahead. And he's committed to protecting our planet for future generations to come.

These values lie at the core of what makes us Democrats. **But what sets John apart is that he has real, common-sense solutions to accomplish these goals.**

We can't get swept away by broad promises that are just impossible to fulfill. Voters will see right through that, and we risk handing this critical election to Trump on a silver platter. That's why we urgently need your help to keep spreading John's message.

**So please, help us continue to give America a sensible alternative to Trump. Chip in $5 or $10 now to John 's campaign:**

name: Important (via NRCC)
subject: Urgent: Matching extended until midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Trump Visits Vietnam and Immediately Trolls Sen. Dick Blumenthal
|

---
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108497/1/)

_America's Newsletter has an important message from the National Republican Congressional Committee._
* * *
President Trump's rally is over.

Our deadline ended.

Matching ended.

Your chance to have 5X the impact on critical 2020 efforts ended.
[**BUT, it's not over yet. Thanks to a group of generous Conservative grassroots supporters, 5X-matching has been extended for you until midnight.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108498/2/)
**Extended Matching: Access Granted** | [](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108499/3/)
---

**[**5X-MATCH NOW**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108498/4/)**

Restoring our Conservative House majority, supporting President Trump and his America First agenda, and defeating the rampant socialist ideology that the far left is attempting to seep into the fabric of our nation are huge reasons why winning in 2020 is crucial.

But, we need you to step up now.

[**Please, chip in anything you can to help us with these vital efforts to win in 2020.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108498/5/)

Thank you,
NRCC HQ

**[**5X-MATCH NOW**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/108498/6/)**

Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/3/7/)

The National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) is the only committee exclusively devoted to increasing the number of Republicans in the U.S. House of Representatives, but we cannot do it without your support. If you would like to donate, please visit our website [here.](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/4/8/) If you instead prefer to donate by mail, please visit [here.](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/74052/9/)

If any of the above information isn't correct or this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, please [ update your record here.](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/35048/10/)

P.S. be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/5/11/) and [Twitter.](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/6/12/) If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas [here](mailto:info@nrccvictory.com) or by replying to this email.

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6411797/136068195/7/13/)
**America's Newsletter
PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313
Unsubscribe**

If you would like to donate, please visit our website If you instead prefer to donate by mail, please visit If any of the above information isn't correct or this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, please P.S. be sure to follow the campaign on and If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas mailto:info@nrccvictory.com or by replying to this email. America's Newsletter PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: L. Lee
subject: Have you heard about Will Hurd and Tim Scott?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
The recent news out of Washington should encourage ALL Republicans to do more.Just because I’m black doesn’t mean I have to subscribe to their voter stereotypes. The fact is, Dems are no friend to the black community, but conservative policies like tax cuts, health care options, and public safety are, and with your support, I'll prove it. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_t=K9rhSoFbKGxqTbRLDhXtykux5wFNlvy77QyFw0az5WNiGFyCG6IHN6xPGi9wbVSRqDMkHvkLFncjryagMRLRdKl4ad6EtRRA7D5rmZdfC5Tvglm9F2IV_4kWTgK-9XOqWMJe91Ct_orYUbkKpcPdYcej9tMYWsY5r_3XKX2ToGs%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB1yI2SuAatAZilRbRZSo4cnfjBJBaIl2mdAPGks_h-oLxEOgOcUbY5f9Ohq1lj0hwn4-CrzlOTCI1lG4DCGzFS-P6Z-m027hZolCXLOxoWIDnxk8-wWdGKQarvM8EZ41SpJKVG86duOYHPpVYkdU-gpheOVsLLCcUb7Y3sP10iuc8X-T2ATiWWkdFwgPCPvy-gar6VZsIJbLKVd8ZNAVSfEnKJelQi7ouzoUFnTso80Z)
---
Friend,

In case you missed it, Rep. Will Hurd (R-TX) recently announced his retirement from the U.S. House of Representatives. **Please allow me a moment to explain to you why this is a blow to the Republican Party**.

You may or may not have heard of Mr. Hurd, or if you have, you might not know that he holds **the distinction of being the only African-American Republican currently serving in the U.S. House.**

**Then** , in another blow to diversity in the Republican Party, Senator Tim Scott (R-South Carolina), announced that should he win another term in the Chamber, it will be his last.

The retirement's of Rep. Hurd and Sen. Scott couldn’t come at a worse time.

**President Trump** is making a concerted effort to reach out to voters of color, and there are signs that his outreach efforts are yielding results – but for African Americans to wake up to the fact that elected Democrats aren’t really friends to their communities, it’s going to take more than one man. **It’s going to take the efforts of the entire Republican Party**.
| [**Donate $25 TO SUPPORT
lerah lee for congress ➔**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB1yI2SuAatAZilRbRZSo4cklIylTkSEoox3jTLNaVVtEHfKkC9emo6ejJa265qGsSA_zBXqX-KM5H9iSHl20TYoBb5hLNfBP9dk6_MYD7GGLs8rwfwVQXchS7lPGO9ya2OizyhkUXy5t2rJH4RbUq6UBnH-6ub7qaioFKDKV3PPsUiUPqe1Hkmqfypq_xbMEETTTFS-9LsTMBPwNj1oyBGt9E4ciwUo3BqPCJ5ALfLBJ)
---

**[I’m a conservative African American woman and I’m running for Congress](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB1yI2SuAatAZilRbRZSo4cm37qtq-8CJjkUDZMjRyun6R4wseUyW9VdkN8s36X9qFTg7OGV_nPTQY3S6z7NhOC5URPwsUM76i0A0uQYxGuhPqgLZGMS-C9woRWQMLhM2zdSkkvhdKhRYi0pSQTcKJifLHJaOOI5WMMAz3rDFPy2Lc8QtRKeh4Son0l7wy1tFgSapodI31d-SAcixCPkdRLA3dvJzuArBaxQ613a8bT8W)** to help President Trump make inroads into the communities’ that have spurned conservatives in the past, but that would stand the most to gain by embracing conservative policy put forth by the Republican Party.

As conservatives and Republicans, we are so much more than a party of old white men, but as a collective unit, we haven’t been good at articulating that. **[Which is one of the reasons I’m running for Congress in Georgia’s 7th District.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB1yI2SuAatAZilRbRZSo4cmwJmL_xkv9VHmt_bbFuBR1BOXMzpYdKYahHhHHzKkdWSiBAYzsvZy8N9CyzWqM6ftBQJPE-pOuErS55WUuBmK-f79YIFL4qZ-ljW-y4-xlQNgIgUTmb_zm3SQbOAo_Qfys0Uclo-z2vZ6k45kjp8dOIOvYSa1Y9XRjq7HY7VwFvtii3hOn3-nRrdUqilLcJEy7PgZOYTgcUkiwFpP7Q0su)**
[**Donate $25 to support
lerah lee to congress ➔**](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB1yI2SuAatAZilRbRZSo4cleE974KuWIAQleJm0LOvXaBI25OD989Y0eAKtifLRY1rzy1wnDj5iFlGCJF89TMWbr4G8-9jeqo3Du_rkcnxVZRY4LUGFMIxQjJltPCcq2B0EFi0zKFJbXoDW9ltGl-0JKwJbVnJWjIBPrFgTgSOkiyUx893pVbPznTei5wmFig6VU_we3hTHJ3yBRb4n8GO3fiWclKmkRvHHSoxXcvUUK)
---

If I’m elected to Congress, I’ll fight back against the narrative the Republican Party doesn’t care about the average American of color – **it’s a narrative that has been spread far and wide by Democrats for generations in order to maintain a stronghold in majority minority communities**.

On the day I'm sworn in as a member of the House, the first question that I’ll ask my colleagues in the Congressional Black Caucus is “** _what are you doing to create opportunities for folks in majority minority communities like Baltimore, Chicago, Detroit, and Philadelphia_**?”

I anticipate the room will 1.) go dead silent or 2.) I’ll be booed out of the meeting and shouted at as a traitor.

**Being on the right side of history is worth temporary condemnation**.

We’ve got so much work to do, and I’m committed to helping President Trump accomplish his agenda.

I will fight for the freedoms and liberties that have made our country strong; and **I will fight against the socialist agenda that keeps many of our brothers and sisters boun** d.

I can’t do this alone, Friend, I need your help if I’m going to get to Washington. Please consider making a contribution to my campaign today:
**[Express donate $25 right now](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=4e5480e80a754b36b04486c910432488&_e=K_5dnRIVI7_07BW9sUXJYpB_fOTmE2k4JBycPh1HmxmcQYquKjIgsfkAY-b2ABGFaOjXYS1GHoPw4FtsZ7iEB0LzulPeTFg18kfIGzkuFYfzyTGDJl7CmhZ2R_jNd714GB8o2UvOKN3F2JJxe1jktTA7QqZru35rRXo69lXZF7hJ5r8srvZm-v7Ng41C4tVXB1Wjb1-0WMN1pOvfVIGsW7gJQspmOY-XqoRnXYRiBeVO5JtoSwAWqcDAfTt9vpKB-3vMUj3GRpn5cCfC2EgZMG5zVZwYKq7tmhZn-gzjgYUReMEi4MDJkCfW5F0EFTIS)

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Join President Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
President Trump visited Minneapolis last Thursday to rally Republicans for 2020... and it was an AMAZING event. He didn’t hold back one bit in calling out the unhinged radical left. And he made his stance in our U.S. Senate race clear.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/2c31df936c0cd605/6cf5cb33110f437dc3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative,

President Trump visited Minneapolis last Thursday to rally Republicans for 2020... and it was an AMAZING event.

He didn’t hold back one bit in calling out the unhinged radical left. And he made his stance in our U.S. Senate race clear.

I am incredibly proud of and grateful for President Trump’s enthusiastic endorsement!

Together, we’re going to fight for a stronger Minnesota and a stronger America. But we can’t do it without YOU, Fellow Conservative.

Help us continue our momentum coming out of last week’s rally.

**[** JOIN with President Trump in supporting my campaign, by making a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 special contribution to help TAKE BACK Minnesota!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/2c31df936c0cd605/622f9ff61e293313c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/2c31df936c0cd605/d18a4bef50335d55c3d6b838967d376c/33183) I’m sure you saw coverage of the chaos that ensued outside of the rally too.

Antifa thugs and their sympathizers – part of the Tina Smith-Ilhan Omar base – did not just come out to protest.

**They violently attacked Trump supporters and the police, destroyed property, and set fires in the streets!**

This is what we’re up against in the battle for the soul of Minnesota and America... and this is what happens when people like Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey side with these radical-left extremists and take stances against law enforcement.

President Trump was clear in his message: _“Over the next 13 months, we are going to fight with all of our heart and soul – and we are going to win the Great State of Minnesota in 2020!”_ We have just over a year to make it happen. **And we WILL make history when we win!**

It is mission critical that we defeat ultra-liberal Tina Smith, who President Trump correctly pointed out “hasn’t done a damn thing” in the U.S. Senate. I’m eager to work with the President to create energy, mining, and timber jobs, support police, secure our borders, protect life, and protect the Second Amendment. These are the issues that matter to real Minnesotans.

[**If you’re with President Trump and me in this fight, rush your most generous possible contribution today**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/2c31df936c0cd605/f411fd072c9b32d9c3d6b838967d376c/33183).

Every day and every dollar matters, as we take on the extreme left and the well-funded Democrat campaign machine.

\- Jason [ Rush a TRUMP ENDORSEMENT CONTRIBUTION >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/2c31df936c0cd605/d0953baa90109fa1c3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Protect access to health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Meaningful coverage is under threat
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d1/39260142/427f846f/626395a9/1030273553/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Growing up with a working nurse as a mom, I learned early about the importance of access to good health care. That led me to become a doctor in the Army, where I treated wounded soldiers during Desert Storm. After I was discharged, I practiced pediatric neurology for more than 25 years in Norfolk. Treating sick children, and children living with disabilities, really opens your eyes to the importance of health coverage -- meaningful, affordable, quality coverage. Access to good health coverage means a patient can see a doctor before a pain or a cough turns into a major illness. Good, meaningful coverage means you can afford your medication, and that your health insurance policy actually covers the health care you need. We provided that, working in a bipartisan way, when we expanded Medicaid in 2018, providing more than 320,000 Virginians with affordable, real health coverage. But meaningful coverage is under threat from Donald Trump and legislators here in Richmond. That's why we need to secure a Democratic majority in the General Assembly on November 5. **[Please fight with me by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or an amount of your choice so we can flip the legislature and improve access to quality health care in Virginia.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d1/39260142/427f846f/626395a8/1030273553/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019#")** As a doctor and as governor of Virginia, I want the best health care for all Virginians. I will leave no stone unturned as I look for ways to make that happen. Thank you for your help. Let's win on November 5! Take care, Ralph

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from The Way Ahead email list, please [click here.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d1/39260142/427f846f/626395ab/1030273553/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://act.ralphnortham.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
PO Box 597
Richmond VA 23218 |

name: ProtectVoting.Org
subject: Elizabeth Warren is taking a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
---
| | Elizabeth Warren is taking a stand against Facebook's unacceptable ad policy. Warren put up an intentionally false ad on Facebook to prove a point -- that Mark Zuckerberg's policy of allowing false ads is incredibly irresponsible for our democracy. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - Elizabeth Warren is taking a stand against Facebook's unacceptable ad policy: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f50/4231912608/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1") Warren put up an intentionally false ad on Facebook to prove a point -- that Mark Zuckerberg's policy of allowing false ads is incredibly irresponsible for our democracy. She even went on to call Facebook a "disinformation-for-profit machine." With all the false information spread through Facebook by foreign powers in 2016 to influence our elections, Zuckerberg has to step up. **[That's why we're trying to send a strong message by getting 10,000 signatures of people who stand with Elizabeth Warren -- will you add your name?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f53/4231912608/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Thatrsquos+why+wersquore+trying+to+send+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")** | | | [Stand with Warren ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f52/4231912608/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Stand+with+Warren+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")
---
[](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f55/4231912608/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")
We're glad Elizabeth Warren is speaking out -- in the age of "fake news," it's never been more crucial to stop the spread of disinformation.
And Facebook has a moral responsibility to do so.
**[If you agree, add your name to stand with Elizabeth Warren in calling out Mark Zuckerberg->](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f54/4231912608/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+If+you+agree+add+your+name+to+stand+with&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")**
| | [Add your name ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f57/4231912608/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/elizabeth_warren?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Add+your+name+&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")
---
We have to protect our elections.
\-- Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0697/72412298/41b728ce/61031f56/4231912608/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1&source=VPP_EM_EN_191018_WarrenFB_U1_X1")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: All-American Heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc
body:
All-American heroes. That’s what it was all about on Monday night, as we welcomed Congressmen and combat vets Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw to...

All-American Heroes

All-American heroes. That’s what it was all about on Monday night, as we welcomed Congressmen and combat vets Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw to Indiana, joining our own Hoosier hero, Congressman Jim Baird, as the featured speakers at our Team Holcomb Fall Dinner.

In front of a packed house, they discussed their military service, and what drives them today as members of Congress. And for them, it’s still all about continued service to our country, and the many forms that service takes. The photo that went viral with the three of them – captioned “5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American.” – was so perfectly captioned, not because of the injuries they faced while in combat, but because these three heroes truly are all-American.

If you couldn’t join us on Monday night, you can watch the full Q&A session with them here (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/videos/426712898242559/?mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , you can view photos of the event here (https://www.facebook.com/indgop/posts/10156426307151875?__xts__%5b0%5d=68.ARBs2aAk-fVq5oPVwPcBltHWZ0pC4FA1W3xp5C5Hg2M7l9teNOv52T0AF_MWSNuYJHNRIGh1SoQFxHo4TEX-UFULl8xMLH0ANlYkgmMUyed7HMoLNfXS1YEe9A8cn3ugqpKQJ_t2Yn2zD_UxY5IDdy_pYJ5MFdoyFEfpU6eFqJu9J-RYsg6qkvzBtxG6O2a7O0uTnffzrduu3I3_cJ002O2hEXyEtXDa_7LuIT_xD0YC0q4A-u1R6U0sKTYsTEnpkeGbfSk3MEzi235vdMq9s3ZT0tQhshmdpNvQR9aI8fcmkBdOAsuh5-VcSujhErziqGyrCOUBSZIW2f43cg&__tn__=-R&mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , and you can check out our live tweets from the event here (https://twitter.com/indgop?mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) .

-Chairman Kyle Hupfer

P.S. While at the dinner on Monday night, I was excited to announce some pretty big news. Governor Holcomb has now officially surpassed (by a significant margin) the number of petition signatures required to make the ballot in 2020! Check out video here of the big announcement (https://twitter.com/HolcombForIN/status/1184562182438215680?mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

PHOTO: Chairman Kyle Hupfer grabs a photo with Congressmen Baird, Crenshaw and Mast prior to the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner on Monday.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Gov. Holcomb Makes 2020 Ballot in Rapid Time!

It's been a big week for Governor Holcomb! In rapid time, Governor Holcomb has surpassed the number of petition signatures required to get on the 2020 ballot. While official records of when campaigns reach the required number of signatures aren't kept, it feels like this was faster than any other campaign in Indiana history! Governor Holcomb also went "Over the Edge" this week in Northwest Indiana to support local efforts to reduce infant mortality.
* Governor Holcomb joined the Mental Health America of Northwest Indiana's "Over the Edge" team and rappelled down five stories in Merrillville to raise awareness of continued local efforts to reduce infant mortality. View the video here (https://twitter.com/GovHolcomb/status/1183128718908252161?mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

* Governor Holcomb's campaign has significantly exceeded the signature requirement to get on the 2020 Republican ballot, with an organized campaign team of staff and volunteers in place more than a year before next year's election! This huge achievement could not have been accomplished without our strong local Republican Party leaders, our field staff, county coordinators and volunteers. Thank you to all of those who have been involved in this achievement!

Save the Date: 2020 Congress of Counties
2020 is just around the corner. And to kick off your election year, we're excited to officially announce Indiana’s first big political event of 2020 – Congress of Counties 2020!

Save the date in your calendar now:
January 31 – February 1, 2020

The big event will be at the Crowne Plaza Hotel Union Station in downtown Indianapolis.

Congress of Counties is a two-day training event for Indiana's Republican party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists. We’ll hold breakout sessions on topics you’ll want to learn about going into the 2020 elections, along with exciting opportunities to hear from our party’s top Hoosier leaders.

Registration will open soon (keep an eye on your inbox), but the room block at the Crowne Plaza Hotel in downtown Indianapolis is open now! To reserve your room at a special rate of $159, call the Crowne Plaza directly at (317) 631-2221 and mention “Congress of Counties.”
http://indiana.gop/2019supersaturdays?mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Three Weekends Remaining:
Super Saturdays 2019

Countdown – just three Saturdays until 2019 Election Day, and we need your help to make sure our Republican mayoral, city council and other municipal candidates win. Sign-up now to volunteer for an upcoming Super Saturday! (https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ae987bf9c8&e=f86a26adea&mc_cid=f3ede883f5&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

As part of our upcoming Super Saturdays, we have three opportunities throughout Indiana for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first.

That includes this weekend in Southern Indiana (campaigning for New Albany mayoral candidate Mark Seabrook), next weekend in Northern Indiana (campaigning for Fort Wayne mayoral candidate Tim Smith) and the weekend of November 2 in Central Indiana (making
calls for our mayoral candidates statewide).

We need YOU to make all of this possible! This is your chance to be a Republican superhero for our mayoral candidates. RSVP now!
