clean_body: All-American heroes. That’s what it was all about on Monday night, as we welcomed Congressmen and combat vets Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw to... All-American Heroes All-American heroes. That’s what it was all about on Monday night, as we welcomed Congressmen and combat vets Brian Mast and Dan Crenshaw to Indiana, joining our own Hoosier hero, Congressman Jim Baird, as the featured speakers at our Team Holcomb Fall Dinner. In front of a packed house, they discussed their military service, and what drives them today as members of Congress. And for them, it’s still all about continued service to our country, and the many forms that service takes. The photo that went viral with the three of them – captioned “5 eyes. 5 arms. 4 legs. All American.” – was so perfectly captioned, not because of the injuries they faced while in combat, but because these three heroes truly are all-American. If you couldn’t join us on Monday night, you can watch the full Q&A session with them here (]) , you can view photos of the event here (]) , and you can check out our live tweets from the event here (]) . -Chairman Kyle Hupfer P.S. While at the dinner on Monday night, I was excited to announce some pretty big news. Governor Holcomb has now officially surpassed (by a significant margin) the number of petition signatures required to make the ballot in 2020! Check out video here of the big announcement (]) ! PHOTO: Chairman Kyle Hupfer grabs a photo with Congressmen Baird, Crenshaw and Mast prior to the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner on Monday. Governor Holcomb's Week That Was Gov. Holcomb Makes 2020 Ballot in Rapid Time! It's been a big week for Governor Holcomb! In rapid time, Governor Holcomb has surpassed the number of petition signatures required to get on the 2020 ballot. While official records of when campaigns reach the required number of signatures aren't kept, it feels like this was faster than any other campaign in Indiana history! Governor Holcomb also went "Over the Edge" this week in Northwest Indiana to support local efforts to reduce infant mortality. Governor Holcomb joined the Mental Health America of Northwest Indiana's "Over the Edge" team and rappelled down five stories in Merrillville to raise awareness of continued local efforts to reduce infant mortality. View the video here (]) ! Governor Holcomb's campaign has significantly exceeded the signature requirement to get on the 2020 Republican ballot, with an organized campaign team of staff and volunteers in place more than a year before next year's election! This huge achievement could not have been accomplished without our strong local Republican Party leaders, our field staff, county coordinators and volunteers. Thank you to all of those who have been involved in this achievement! Save the Date: 2020 Congress of Counties 2020 is just around the corner. And to kick off your election year, we're excited to officially announce Indiana’s first big political event of 2020 – Congress of Counties 2020! Save the date in your calendar now: January 31 – February 1, 2020 The big event will be at the Crowne Plaza Hotel Union Station in downtown Indianapolis. Congress of Counties is a two-day training event for Indiana's Republican party leaders, candidates, and grassroots activists. We’ll hold breakout sessions on topics you’ll want to learn about going into the 2020 elections, along with exciting opportunities to hear from our party’s top Hoosier leaders. Registration will open soon (keep an eye on your inbox), but the room block at the Crowne Plaza Hotel in downtown Indianapolis is open now! To reserve your room at a special rate of $159, call the Crowne Plaza directly at (317) 631-2221 and mention “Congress of Counties.” ] Three Weekends Remaining: Super Saturdays 2019 Countdown – just three Saturdays until 2019 Election Day, and we need your help to make sure our Republican mayoral, city council and other municipal candidates win. Sign-up now to volunteer for an upcoming Super Saturday! (]) As part of our upcoming Super Saturdays, we have three opportunities throughout Indiana for you to volunteer on several down-to-the-wire races where your work could help set our candidates over the top -- making sure that they cross the finish line first. That includes this weekend in Southern Indiana (campaigning for New Albany mayoral candidate Mark Seabrook), next weekend in Northern Indiana (campaigning for Fort Wayne mayoral candidate Tim Smith) and the weekend of November 2 in Central Indiana (making calls for our mayoral candidates statewide). We need YOU to make all of this possible! This is your chance to be a Republican superhero for our mayoral candidates. RSVP now! October 19 New Albany Mayoral Candidate Mark Seabrook RSVP Here (]) October 26 Fort Wayne Mayoral Candidate Tim Smith RSVP Here (]) November 2 State Party HQ Phone Bank RSVP Here (]) Vote Now! Early voting has now begun for municipal elections throughout Indiana! Have you voted yet? Visit the Indiana Secretary of State’s Official Voter Portal – IndianaVoters.com (]) – now to get your latest voting info, including a full list of candidates on your ballot, your polling (and early voting) locations and hours, and more! Upcoming Republican Events October 23 (]) : Huntington County GOP "Under the Dome" October 28 (]) : Orange County Fall Dinner November 1 (]) : Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner November 1 (]) : Sullivan County Fall Dinner November 5: Election Day December 6 (]) : Greater Indianapolis Republican Women's Club Holiday Luncheon and Silent Auction Have an upcoming Republican event not listed here? name: Public Lands Update (via Team Wilmot)
subject: 5,000 Signatures Needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
Help protect public lands
# [](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c9/995556366/VEsH/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1910-q4-wc?refcode=header")
**The new director of the Bureau of Land Management (BLM) is an outspoken advocate for selling off public lands.**
[**Look, if you believe that OUR land belongs to the PEOPLE, not corporations, help us collect 5,000 signatures by midnight. Together, we can keep public lands in public hands. >>**](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c6/995556366/VEsE/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/protect-public-lands?refcode=191018-email")
[ADD MY NAME](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c6/995556366/VEsF/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/protect-public-lands?refcode=191018-email")

* * *
Folks, this kind of news is devastating for both Montana and our country.
[](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c6/995556366/VEsC/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/protect-public-lands?refcode=191018-email")
_Public lands are not only spaces for communities to come together, but they also preserve natural resources and awe-inspiring beauty for future generations._
Our great state has over 8 MILLION acres of beautiful public lands, home to myriad flora and fauna, from the humble Western Meadowlark to the stately Ponderosa Pine.
What does Senator Steve Daines -- or should we say his big oil special interest backers -- think about the man who's likely to sell us all out and hand OUR lands to private corporations?
**" I've not found a reason to be against him," and Montanans' concerns are "overblown" \-- Senator Steve Daines**
Frankly, Daines' lack of concern in selling off 250 million acres of public land is UNACCEPTABLE.
_We must demand more from our leaders in protecting these precious lands._
[So, if you agree that it's up to all of us to hold the powerful accountable and keep what is rightfully ours in the hands of the people, add your name to this important petition.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c6/995556366/VEsD/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://act.wilmotcollins.com/protect-public-lands?refcode=191018-email")
Thanks for fighting for our public lands,

Team Wilmot

* * *
Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Supporters like you are a crucial part of our team, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c7/995556366/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). To change your email address or update your contact info, [click here.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c4/995556366/VEsB/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://wilmotcollins.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/update-your-contact-info?source=footer") [Make a contribution now to elect Wilmot Collins as Montana's next U.S. Senator.](https://act.wilmotcollins.com/page/m/561646a0/1e3760f0/6916e995/5f7ed3c5/995556366/VEsO/?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1908-q3-wc?refcode=footer")

#
Peter,
We know you get a lot of emails, but we just wanted you to know how grateful Senator Durbin is that so many supporters are stepping up and joining his campaign to take back the Senate.
We know we need to end Mitch McConnell's era of failed leadership and elect a Democratic majority that will move our country forward. But Senator Durbin can't do this on his own--he needs all of us standing with him in the fight to defeat Mitch McConnell and President Trump.
**[Senator Durbin is so close to meeting his fundraising goal, so we're asking one more time, Peter: will you contribute $5 to help take back the Senate?](https://action.dickdurbin.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-oct-2019-goal?refcode=em191018&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Marjan
subject: can't get swamped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
There are just 19 days between now and Election Day and it seems like campaign ads are running non-stop on TV.
|
---

| | Peter,

There are just 19 days between now and Election Day and it seems like campaign ads are running non-stop on TV. There's a lot of noise, so it's all the more important that Andy's ads don't get drowned out. It costs $450 to run one spot on the local 6pm news. That adds up quickly.

**We 've set a one-day goal of $5,000 to make sure that we can fully fund our next television buy and bring Andy's message to thousands of Kentuckians. Will you chip in? ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f45f/2981749173/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f45c/2981749173/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f45d/2981749173/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f452/2981749173/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f453/2981749173/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f450/2981749173/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?refcode=20191018.1nd__376__")** You've probably seen the nasty, grainy, and fear-mongering attack ads from Matt Bevin and his out-of-state backers. We can't let this crowd out Andy's message on health care and public education.

This race a toss-up and polls show a dead heat. Matt Bevin has already put $3.45 million of his personal fortune into his reelection campaign and who knows what he'll do next. We can't afford to miss our goal. **[Chip in today to get Andy's message out to as many voters as possible.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/525579dc/ad6dc73/145c3419/db7f451/2981749173/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-adsonair?refcode=20191018.1nd__376__&amount=5")**

Thanks,

In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: Warner HQ
subject: Pence is wasting his time in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Republicans are in serious danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it.
|
---
| | | **ALERT: Mike Pence Coming to Virginia**
**We need your help to fight back**
**Supporter:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation to Fight Back Fund:** Not Yet
**Donate to Mark's Fight Back Fund[HERE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16a0/1446495070/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
---
Derek,

Republicans are in _serious_ danger of losing the Virginia General Assembly on November 5th and they know it. **So now they're pulling out all the stops by bringing Vice President Pence in at the 11th hour to hold a rally.**

Republicans think that Pence's visit will translate into a win for them -- but we know Democrats can translate it into even stronger motivation to turn (and keep) Virginia blue!

**[Will you donate now to Mark Warner's Fight Back Fund to show Pence that Virginia will elect Democrats-- now and in 2020?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16af/1446495070/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?refcode=20191018d__287__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

**Mark has campaigned hard for Democratic General Assembly candidates. He knows that Democrats across the commonwealth must do _everything they can_ to support each other.** But Republicans aren't backing down: Trump's already investing heavily, training volunteers, and hiring staff in Virginia with his "victory initiative." Now Pence's upcoming visit underscores the administration's determination to woo Virginia voters in 2020.

But they underestimate us: Virginians have been fighting back against the abuses of the Trump administration since the very beginning. Now, with just 18 days until the election, **will you support Mark's Fight Back Fund to show Pence that Virginia Democrats are committed to making Virginia blue in November and in 2020?**
[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16ae/1446495070/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")
****[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16ad/1446495070/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")****
[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16ac/1446495070/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")
[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16ab/1446495070/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")
[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16aa/1446495070/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?express_lane=true&refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")
[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d05c/53d9897e/521ec2e5/1c8c16a9/1446495070/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-penceva?refcode=20191018nd__287__&refcode2=express_lane_other")
Thank you,

Your friends at Warner Headquarters

name: Eric Ming
subject: Andrew is taking questions live from voters across America now:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Taking your questions as we speak.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ) Yang Gang --

Andrew is live now on our website and across social media taking questions from voters throughout America. [Tune in and watch now here.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13929?t=2&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ)

We’re running a different type of campaign -- one that listens to voters and makes Andrew available to take questions and hear from everyone.

So tune in now and hear Andrew take questions -- and tell your friends to join in too: | [Watch Now](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13929?t=3&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ)
---
We know a debate stage with 12 candidates given barely over a minute to answer questions isn’t the best way to get to know your next president. That’s why we’re taking our message directly to the people.

Hope you can be a part,

Eric Ming
Digital Director

P.S. And as a special thank you to everyone who asked a question and pitched in (or pitches in a contribution today), you might receive a call from Andrew. He’ll be calling supporters throughout the day to thank them. [Pitch in here and you might get a call!](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13932?t=4&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=5&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=6&akid=1825%2E377263%2EgMWgwJ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

New York, NY

name: Team Warren
subject: Two million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
There's only one way Elizabeth is raising money for this campaign: through contributions from people like you. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528058/45c30650/10dc9da86/66f0ba7d/3380792950/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Our team is so close to reaching two million contributions!

Hitting this milestone will send a powerful message that a handful of wealthy donors with large checks no longer control our democracy. Instead, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters and their small-dollar contributions have the power to make big, structural change.

[**We need 231 more people from Pennsylvania to make their first donation today to stay on track to hitting this goal. Will you be one of the 231? name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Celebrating LGBTQ+ History Month [PHOTOS]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
As we join in celebration, we must also remember that there is more work to do. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/7030463/3781058419/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Last Friday, Team Fair Fight celebrated National Coming Out Day. And on Sunday, Fair Fight Founder, Stacey Abrams, proudly marched in the Atlanta Pride Parade as a staunch ally of the LGBTQ+ community and as a Grand Marshal for this year's parade. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/7030460/3781058419/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.advocate.com/photography/2019/10/14/photos-atlanta-celebrates-pride-grand-marshall-stacey-abrams") Help us ensure that LGBTQ voters and all voters across the country are able to register, access the ballot, and have their vote counted - no matter who they are, what they look like, or whom they love. **[SEE PHOTOS FROM Atlanta pride »](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/7030460/3781058419/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.advocate.com/photography/2019/10/14/photos-atlanta-celebrates-pride-grand-marshall-stacey-abrams")** **[VOLUNTEER WITH FAIR FIGHT » ](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/7030461/3781058419/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/take-action?source=IE101819LGBTQ")** **[spread the word on social »](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046e/3781058419/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/intent/retweet?tweet_id=1178068477225132032")** **[commit to vote in 2019 »](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046f/3781058419/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com/commit")** **[chip in to support our work »](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046c/3781058419/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE101819LGBTQ-3a")** In 2018, Stacey Abrams became the first gubernatorial nominee in Georgia history to march in the Atlanta Pride Parade. [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046d/3781058419/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE101819LGBTQ-3a") Marching in pride is both a celebration and a reminder of the work we must do: stop discrimination and end hate crimes, especially those committed against trans women of color. So as we celebrate, we remember the contributions of brave Americans like Marsha P. Johnson and Sylvia Rivera, who 50 years ago envisioned a world where people would be free to be themselves, free to identify, free to live, and free to love. There's a long road ahead before Marsha and Sylvia's dream becomes a reality. But we know that if we speak out, work hard, and ensure that every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly and accurately counted, we can transform our country. Onward,
Team Fair Fight
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046a/3781058419/VEsP/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/703046b/3781058419/VEsHBQ/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa567/34a064cc/1b2d1a8b/7030468/3781058419/VEsHBA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

Friend,
I just got an email directly from President Trump himself! Did you see it? If not, I forwarded it below.

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins released her fundraising results from last quarter...and we outraised her!
body:
This is big.

Friends,
Susan Collins just released her fundraising results from last quarter...and we outraised her.
This is really big for our campaign. Collins outraised us during our first quarter, so _we 're pulling ahead!_
**But that means Collins ' wealthy donors will start pouring even more money into this race to catch up to our grassroots funded campaign. We have to keep pushing: **
[**Make a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon 's campaign today. Help us build on our early momentum so we can defeat Susan Collins next year. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9c/4bef7a87/6b513ab9/287fd51c/3899233800/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191018-2-full")
We proved here that you can't beat grassroots money with big donors. That's incredibly powerful - and important for our campaign since we're rejecting all corporate PAC donations.
Thank you for helping us do that,
\- Team Sara
_\---Original email----_
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9c/4bef7a87/6b513ab9/287fd513/3899233800/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-launch?refcode=em191018-2-full")

Friends - I have news.
Our team just finished calculating our fundraising numbers from last quarter. It took us a while because _so many people_ chipped in to support our campaign.
Here are some important numbers from our FEC report:
* **86,438** \- Number of individual contributions since our campaign launch.
* **$27.56** \- Our average online contribution this quarter.
* **0** \- Number of donations from corporate PACs.

Meanwhile, Susan Collins is raising outrageous sums of money from corporate interests and Trump allies. Two former Mitch McConnell staffers even headlined a high-dollar fundraising event for her!
We're proud to be funding our campaign through small-dollar donations, and grateful to supporters like you for helping us do it. BUT it means we have to work extra hard to keep up with Susan Collins. That's why I have to ask:
[**Will you make a $3 contribution today to help us keep our incredible momentum going? If we want to win, we have to keep pushing as hard as we can.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9c/4bef7a87/6b513ab9/287fd51c/3899233800/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191018-2-full")
At the end of the day, Susan Collins only has a rolodex of wealthy donors on her side. We have all of you, and that's why we're going to win.
Thank you for being a part of this.
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
**Help us keep our grassroots momentum going by making a $3 contribution today. If we want to win, we have to keep pushing.**
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c9c/4bef7a87/6b513ab9/287fd51c/3899233800/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTgtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191018-2-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine

South Freeport, ME 04078

| Fellow Republican,
Remember this picture of former Arizona Governor Jan Brewer raising her finger to President Obama on the tarmac and how it drove the unstable media into a tizzy? Remember how they labeled Governor Brewer as rude and racist for daring to confront Obama in such a manner?
| [HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79365&L=24032&F=H)
---

Well, in an abrupt about-face, the [Mainstream Media](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79365&L=24033&F=H) is now applauding Nancy Pelosi for raising her finger to President Trump while demanding he keep U.S. troops in Syria indefinitely. But, because Nancy Pelosi is a Democrat, she’s hailed a hero. Where's the accountability for the hypocrisy and obvious bias from the media? We know they won't hold themselves accountable, so it's up to us!

If media bias is not addressed, liberal reporters will continue to carry water for the radical Left. **[Support the Republican Party of Arizona and our mission to HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79365&L=24032&F=H)**.

Signed,

[](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79365&L=24032&F=H)

Dr. Kelli Ward
Chairman
Republican Party of Arizona

name: Josh Mahony
subject: Coming soon to theaters!
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
It's almost opening night, but I'm not talking about a show.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191018theater&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

It's almost opening night, but I'm not talking about a show.

**We 're opening up our first campaign office! ** [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d51/382d5bd5/729d037/3b0759ce/3080834166/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoibWFob255LW9jdG9iZXIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImVtMTkxMDE4dGhlYXRlciJ9/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191018theater&recurring=auto") We are excited to have a dedicated space to organize, make calls, and connect with voters. It's a sign that we're growing and are building momentum.

**[Josh wants to open many more offices across the state so he can reach every voter in Arkansas, but we can't do it without your help. Pitch in $5 today so we can raise $10,000 before the end of the week and open more offices in every corner of the state.](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191018theater&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $5](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $25](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-october?refcode=em191018theater&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**Even though our first office is opening in a theater, we know Arkansans are sick and tired of the reality show that 's going on in Washington. We know that we can do better than having Tom Cotton be Donald Trump's right-hand man in this show.**

Let's be clear: If you think folks should get healthcare without going bankrupt, that farmers shouldn't pay the price for Trump's reckless trade war, that Arkansans should have a voice in Washington that stands up for us, not the corporate PACs and mega-donors -- you haven't lost your mind, you're just paying attention.

**[Can I count on you to rush a contribution of $5 and help our grassroots team reach its full potential?](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191018theater&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's show them that we're ready to win,

Josh

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
Following four hours of talks and negotiation, a U.S. delegation led by Vice President Mike Pence reported that... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=90ee0d977e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| _**FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP WANTS YOU TO READ**_
---
| | | [Mike Pence: Turkey Agrees to Five-Day Cease-Fire to Withdraw Kurdish Fighters](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c574f34ed2&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Washington Times_
Following four hours of talks and negotiation, a U.S. delegation led by Vice President Mike Pence reported that Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan “was prepared to call off his military incursion into Syria,” Tom Howell Jr. reports. A 5-day halt in Turkish operations will allow the U.S. to help Kurdish fighters exit a 20-mile border buffer zone, and once complete, Erdogan’s forces will help the U.S. detain ISIS fighters in the region.
---
|
---
| [Quid Pro Nothing: Trump Accusers Don’t Care About the Facts](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78b0c5beb8&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
President Trump’s critics “went berserk Thursday, claiming that acting White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney had just admitted to a quid pro quo with Ukraine. Except that what Mulvaney ‘admitted’ is that the administration was doing what it should — pushing a foreign government to cooperate in getting to the bottom of foreign interference in the 2016 campaign,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

**Must-read:** [“Schiff Pushed Volker to Say Ukraine Felt Pressure from Trump”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf90ac650a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trump Visit Brings the World to New Louis Vuitton Workshop in Johnson County](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=37ad42334b&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Dallas Morning News_
“French luxury brand Louis Vuitton put Johnson County [Texas] on the map Thursday as the world followed President Donald Trump to the ribbon-cutting of the company’s new $50 million leather workshop,” Maria Halkias writes. “Louis Vuitton signed the president’s ‘pledge to America’s workers’ earlier this month,” which so far has generated more than 14 million new job and training opportunities for America’s great labor force.

[President Trump welcomes Louis Vuitton to Texas!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af6cf4eb8e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Blues Celebrate Championship with White House Visit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af89755f6c&e=3ee4985eea)
-NHL.com
“After a championship parade, a Stanley Cup Tour around the world, a ring ceremony, a Hockey Hall of Fame visit and a banner-raising on Opening Night, only one more celebration remained for the Stanley Cup Champion St. Louis Blues, and that was a visit to the White House,” Chris Pinkert writes. After falling to last place in the NHL midway through the season, the Blues’ dramatic turnaround is a true American comeback story.

** ****Watch:** [President Trump hosts the 2019 Stanley Cup Champions](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a4887dd46d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Trip of a Lifetime! Trump Gives Little League Champs Ride Back to Louisiana Aboard Air Force One](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=411ed3e3ea&e=3ee4985eea)
-Media Research Center
After a visit to the White House last Friday to commemorate winning this year’s Little League World Series title, the kids of the Eastbank All-Stars team got one more surprise: an invitation from President Trump to ride back home in Air Force One. The President happened to be visiting their home state of Louisiana later that day, Nick Kangadis reports.

**🎬** [Little League World Series champs meet President Trump](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=61dec6ebea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d970ceb6e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f45ed15ca5&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=c064b68e7d)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: People, not wealthy donors, first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf8c/3eb3e2fc/547fab2c/744c1a2f/2594438036/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.julianforthefuture.com")
---
| | The way we campaign is a reflection of our values.

While some candidates dismiss the power of grassroots support in favor of wealthy donors, **I am proud that my campaign has the highest percentage of grassroots donors of any candidate.**

I know that the reason so many working folks support my campaign is because I have focused on issues that matter to them.

While other campaigns focused on attacking bold ideas and the frontrunners in the last debate, I was the only one to highlight police violence, the shooting of Atatiana Jefferson, and I was the only candidate to point out the hypocrisy of letting ISIS fighters run free in Syria while keeping innocent children in cages at our southern border.

I was disappointed to hear today that Mayor Buttigieg accepted a maximum donation and planned to attend a fundraiser co-hosted by the former city attorney in Chicago who worked to make sure the public never got to see the footage of police killing 17-year-old Laquan McDonald. I applaud Mayor Buttigieg for returning the contribution, but at a time where police violence remains such a critical issue, it shouldn't take four months to return such a problematic contribution.

**My campaign has always put people first.**

When I began this race, I didn't go to Iowa or New Hampshire, I went to San Juan, Puerto Rico, to tell our fellow citizens there that, if elected president, I wouldn't forget them.

I visited the storm drain tunnels under the Las Vegas strip that provide shelter to people struggling with homelesness.

And I crossed the border to Matamoros, Mexico, to see the devastating consequences of Donald Trump's Remain in Mexico policy.

It's no secret that my campaign hasn't raised as much as some of the other campaigns in this race -- I've refused to accept money from corporate (or any) PACs, and federal lobbyists and I will NOT compromise my principles. This campaign belongs to you and no matter what, I will continue to focus on the issues that matter and the communities that have often been left behind.

Contribute today if you believe in this vision and agree that this is how campaigns should be run:
| | [**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191018_em_fr_b2_castro_all_annc&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf8c/3eb3e2fc/547fab2c/744c1a17/2594438036/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf8c/3eb3e2fc/547fab2c/744c1a16/2594438036/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fcf8c/3eb3e2fc/547fab2c/744c1a15/2594438036/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

clean_body: | | | | | "" | | The way we campaign is a reflection of our values. While some candidates dismiss the power of grassroots support in favor of wealthy donors, I am proud that my campaign has the highest percentage of grassroots donors of any candidate. I know that the reason so many working folks support my campaign is because I have focused on issues that matter to them. While other campaigns focused on attacking bold ideas and the frontrunners in the last debate, I was the only one to highlight police violence, the shooting of Atatiana Jefferson, and I was the only candidate to point out the hypocrisy of letting ISIS fighters run free in Syria while keeping innocent children in cages at our southern border. I was disappointed to hear today that Mayor Buttigieg accepted a maximum donation and planned to attend a fundraiser co-hosted by the former city attorney in Chicago who worked to make sure the public never got to see the footage of police killing 17-year-old Laquan McDonald. I applaud Mayor Buttigieg for returning the contribution, but at a time where police violence remains such a critical issue, it shouldn't take four months to return such a problematic contribution. My campaign has always put people first. When I began this race, I didn't go to Iowa or New Hampshire, I went to San Juan, Puerto Rico, to tell our fellow citizens there that, if elected president, I wouldn't forget them. I visited the storm drain tunnels under the Las Vegas strip that provide shelter to people struggling with homelesness. And I crossed the border to Matamoros, Mexico, to see the devastating consequences of Donald Trump's Remain in Mexico policy. It's no secret that my campaign hasn't raised as much as some of the other campaigns in this race -- I've refused to accept money from corporate (or any) PACs, and federal lobbyists and I will NOT compromise my principles. This campaign belongs to you and no matter what, I will continue to focus on the issues that matter and the communities that have often been left behind. Contribute today if you believe in this vision and agree that this is how campaigns should be run: | | "" "" "" "" "" Thank you, Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper. Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge: Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign? "" Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know "". If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe "", and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Team Beto
subject: Proud
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]Beto at the Rally Against Fear

Last night was electric. Thousands of us gathered with Beto at our Rally
Against Fear. It was a powerful reminder of how strong we are when we
stand together.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]Trump is determined to ruin our momentum, so he used his rally to
attack Beto. Will you chip in $3 to show Trump that his
attacks won’t stop us from fighting for Beto’s message?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]Contribute $3

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Last night there were 2 rallies in
Texas.

Trump held a campaign rally in Dallas, bearing a message of hate.

* He bragged about his phone call with the Ukrainian President and how
Democrats will never be able to impeach him

* He spread more lies about how scared we need to be of liberals taking
your guns away, illegal immigrants, “crazy” Nancy Pelosi, and fake
news

* He attacked Beto calling him “very dumb” and smeared Beto’s platform

We held a Rally Against Fear just miles away from where Trump was ––
asking folks to come and stand together in solidarity against our
president’s divisive agenda.

* We honored the lives of 22 Texans who became victims of Trump’s
racist, anti-immigrant rhetoric and all those who have suffered at the
hands of his bigoted administration

* We reaffirmed our promise as a campaign to fearlessly lead on the
issues you care about most, no matter the political cost

* And we made it clear that the only way Beto is going to defeat Trump
is if we come together as one just like we did last night

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]We’re counting on our supporters to unite again and help us reach a
critical $2 million fundraising goal. Will you please chip in
$3 now?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]Contribute $3

What we witnessed last night was incredible.

But the sad truth is that moments like last night can’t happen without
money and we need to keep showing up in the places Trump spreads his hate
if we want to confront his message.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/39143?refcode=ema20191018-62158&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk ]Will you chip in $3 to help us keep confronting Trump
and make Beto’s voice heard in this race?

- Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191018footer&t=1025&refcode2=62158_444211_6mwQMk&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=62158%2E444211%2E6mwQMk

name: Mike Turner
subject: I am running to protect Ohio jobs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0).

I believe there is still so much work to be done in Congress. We must reelect strong leaders like myself so that we are able to retake the House majority in 2020. If we are not successful, Pelosi and her Squad will push forward with their socialist policies like the Green New Deal and the 32 trillion dollar Medicare for All.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
I'm Mike Turner and I'm running for reelection right here in the Miami Valley!
I believe there is still so much work to be done in Congress. We must reelect strong leaders so that we are able to retake the House majority in 2020. If we are not successful, [_**Pelosi and her Squad will push forward with their socialist policies like the Green New Deal and the 32 trillion dollar Medicare for All**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
While in Congress, I have fought each and every day to bring more jobs and funding to Wright-Patterson Air Force Base and the Dayton area. I have also led on the important issue of eradicating the opioid epidemic in our state.
My opponent is a Washington lobbyist who would ally with Nancy Pelosi if elected. To defeat her in 2020, I'm going to need the help of patriots just like you to prevent the attacks of the unlimited financial resources that liberal groups aim to pour into our district on her behalf.
Like other socialists, my opponent would support Medicare Care for All, open borders, and amnesty for those who entered this country illegally.
The contrast could not be clearer. I have a history of leadership in Congress and bringing back jobs to this area. [_**Without your support, Ohio stands to lose out on thousands of jobs**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0).
I am running to protect Ohio jobs and pensions of those in our district while my opponent wants to push for big government intervention and obstructionism of Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff. [_**Can I count on you to donate today to help protect Ohioans from socialist policies that would have devastating effects on our local economy?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)[_**Yes! I 'll donate $55 to protect Ohio jobs today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Yes! I 'll donate $45 to protect Ohio jobs today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Yes! I 'll donate $35 to protect Ohio jobs today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[_**Yes! I 'll donate Any Amount to protect Ohio jobs today!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,
Mike Turner
**[**DONATE TODAY**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDA5MjIyMjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTYyMTcxMTc5OQS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER

name: M.E. Smith, Team Hick
subject: Mitch McConnell plans to play a big role in this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
He's funneling millions to shady allies who are planning to spend big to keep the GOP's Senate majority. And they plan to use those resources to help Cory Gardner more than any other incumbent Republi | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a79657/2683319694/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_template")
---
| Team,

A new report out this week makes one thing clear: **Colorado is Mitch McConnell 's No. 1 Senate priority, and he will spare no expense to save this seat.**

He's funneling millions to shady allies who are planning to spend big to keep the GOP's Senate majority. And they plan to use those resources to help Cory Gardner more than any other incumbent Republican in 2020.

**Beating us is at the top of their agenda --that's how much this team threatens them. **[**_Let 's show that dark money can't buy this seat--make a donation of $5 or more today._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191018_MES_20191018-fr-MES-darkmoney-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

Mitch McConnell knows that this Senate seat is one of the most flippable seats of 2020. And poll after poll shows that Gardner is falling farther behind, becoming one of the most disliked senators in the country.

But Gardner has been a reliable, shameless yes-man for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell's agenda, and their allies have made it known they will do everything they can to come to his rescue.

[**_Chip in now to help our grassroots team fight back against the dirty special-interest money that 's about to flood this race._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191018_MES_20191018-fr-MES-darkmoney-all_all_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=") **Let 's make this Cory Gardner's final term in Congress--and Mitch McConnell's last as majority leader.**

Last quarter, we nearly caught up to Gardner's fundraising numbers-- all with the power of grassroots donations rather than huge checks from corporate PACs and special interests. Let's keep showing what we're made of.

Thank you,
M.E.

M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Team Hick [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-oct?refcode=em_fr_20191018_MES_20191018-fr-MES-darkmoney-all_all_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a79653/2683319694/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a79650/2683319694/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a79651/2683319694/VEsB/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a7964e/2683319694/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a7964f/2683319694/VEsP/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a7964c/2683319694/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377148d/691c9bd/6fc6aa68/11a79653/2683319694/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Bill Weld
subject: enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGBncQRJfuEb_3bdbGHqauOw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=1) Friend, Enough is enough. Just yesterday, the Trump administration:
* admitted to a corrupt quid-pro-quo in efforts to persuade Ukraine to investigate political opponents,
* “negotiated” a ceasefire between Turkish and Syrian forces (which was literally broken hours after Trump Admin officials left the area),
* and announced that President Trump’s own property would host the G7 summit--while telling the world that nobody will ever see how that decision was made.

I wish I could tell you that everything that’s happening in our politics is normal. Or reasonable. Or acceptable. Unfortunately, I can’t. Every day is something new, and trying to keep up with the whirlwind of un-American, dystopian issues we face each morning is a continuous challenge. But those feelings of anxiety and hopelessness? They’re not permanent. And there is something you can do to fight back today. The polls show us gaining ground to hold POTUS accountable in this Republican primary. For that momentum to continue, we need to channel our concerns into action. And to do that, I need your help. **[Please consider joining this movement and sending a donation today. This is a fight worth winning, and it’s something that we can all feel proud to be a part of.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGBncQRJfuEb_3bdbGHqauOw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=2)** You have my word that when I’m President, the daily nonsense will end the minute I swear my oath. | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGBncQRJfuEb_3bdbGHqauOw&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=3)
---
Thanks for standing with me,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=4).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=5) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191018_fr_s&n=7), software for leaders.
clean_body: | Friend, Enough is enough. Just yesterday, the Trump administration: admitted to a corrupt quid-pro-quo in efforts to persuade Ukraine to investigate political opponents, “negotiated” a ceasefire between Turkish and Syrian forces (which was literally broken hours after Trump Admin officials left the area), and announced that President Trump’s own property would host the G7 summit--while telling the world that nobody will ever see how that decision was made. I wish I could tell you that everything that’s happening in our politics is normal. Or reasonable. Or acceptable. Unfortunately, I can’t. Every day is something new, and trying to keep up with the whirlwind of un-American, dystopian issues we face each morning is a continuous challenge. But those feelings of anxiety and hopelessness? They’re not permanent. And there is something you can do to fight back today. The polls show us gaining ground to hold POTUS accountable in this Republican primary. For that momentum to continue, we need to channel our concerns into action. And to do that, I need your help. ** You have my word that when I’m President, the daily nonsense will end the minute I swear my oath. | | Thanks for standing with me, Bill Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
